artPrompt: A sprawling reclaimed wetland of murky green pools and rust-streaked reeds, half-sunk concrete pipes and drifting litter glinting with sickly bioluminescence, mutant overgrowth creeping across the banks under a bruised stormy sky, mist hanging low over the still toxic water, no figures, a tender mournful wilderness, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Three-Mile Marsh
text:
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Mutant, Sludge, or Horror spell.
The marsh used to be a parking lot, a strip mall, and a parking lot again. Now it's just marsh, and it's spreading.
flavorText: Real estate listings now describe it as 'reclaimed wetland habitat,' which is technically the kindest possible spin.
